Description: Umbraco Hidden Content plugin: hide nodes from navigation and sitemaps while keeping them accessible by URL via the umbracoNaviHide property. Supports Umbraco 13 (net8.0) and Umbraco 17 (net10.0).

AuthorDetails.Name: SplatDev
AuthorDetails.Description: SplatDev Ltda — building Umbraco plugins and tools for agencies and developers.
